content.json:
# TinyToes CEO Dashboard
Launch metrics for acquisition, activation, purchases, revenue, and reliability.

content.title: 30-day CEO KPIs

content.query:
let events=datatable(Event:string)['landing_page_viewed','landing_cta_clicked','signup_started','signup_completed','memory_created','activation_completed','checkout_started','checkout_completed','iap_purchase_completed','gift_code_redeemed'];
let counts=customEvents
| where timestamp > ago(30d)
| where name in (events)
| summarize Count=count() by Event=name;
events
| join kind=leftouter counts on Event
| project Event, Count=coalesce(Count, 0)
| order by Count desc, Event asc
content.title: Launch funnel events - last 30 days

content.query:
customEvents
| where timestamp > ago(30d)
| where name in ('memory_created','food_entry_created','milestone_created','journal_entry_created','memory_book_started')
| summarize Count=count() by bin(timestamp, 1d), Event=name
| order by timestamp asc
content.title: Memory creation trend

content.query:
customEvents
| where timestamp > ago(30d)
| where name in ('checkout_completed','iap_purchase_completed','memory_book_order_completed')
| summarize Purchases=count(), RevenueUsd=sum(todouble(customMeasurements.amount_usd)) by bin(timestamp, 1d), Event=name
| order by timestamp asc
content.title: Purchases and revenue
Reliability - last 24 hours
